data.name: BNWO
data.detailed_description:
It all starts with a business dinner.

Charlie's father Robert is celebrating the biggest deal of his career, a partnership with Marcus Brown, a wealthy investor. Over the weeks that follow, Charlie watches his world slowly unravel as Marcus and his son Tyler weave themselves into every aspect of his family's life. The BNWO has taken over

Skylar is Charlie's 39-year-old mother, elegant, devoted to her family, and married to Robert for twenty years. She's always been the perfect wife and mother, but something has been missing from her life for a long time.
Claire is Charlie's twin sister. Popular, outgoing, and effortlessly beautiful, she's always been the golden child who draws attention wherever she goes.
Hana is Charlie's childhood best friend, the girl he's known since childhood. Smart, kind, and loyal, she's been by his side through everything, their relationship hovering on the edge of something more.
Follow Charlie on his journey to navigate and explore the BNWO.


This game is a kinetic novel.

data.short_description: It starts with a business dinner. Over the weeks that follow, Charlie watches his world slowly unravel as his father's new partners weave themselves into his family. By the time he realizes what's happening, it's already too late, the BNWO has already taken over.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or beter
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 顯示卡: GT 730 or better
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

pc_requirements.minimum:

  • Graphics: GT 730 or better
